first_dialog: Alright kid, it seems you did quite a number on that robot, nice work!
So yeah, while some of the RAM sticks got fried, I was still able to salvage some good stuff. I can't wait to upgrade my gaming PC...
Oh yeah, that too. Yeah, I got the RAM needed to repair the Swapdeck. Now we need a GPU, which is going to be kind of hard to get, given the computer part shortages.
However, I do think I know where we can get one - a new AI data center opened nearby and I think I saw a job posting for mowing their front lawn.
Here's the plan: I think the data center manager is coming by soon so go check the job board, show him the work contract, and then take the job offer.
Once you're done mowing the lawn, you break into the data center, rush past security, grab a GPU, and then get out of there before the cops arrive.
It probably is, but as long as you run faster than the security thugs, you should be fine. Now go get that GPU!
possible_dialog: Do you have the GPU? No? Then go get it! I can't help you repair the Swapdeck if I don't have the parts!
